_meta.description: Manually-staged / CLI-ingested audit values that overlay the Python value store at read time. Managed by scripts/ingest/audit-fill.ts under strict source-priority + overwrite rules (a blank never overwrites a sourced value; conflicts are kept and flagged). Empty by default — the value store remains the authoritative source.

niva-bupa::net_worth_ifrs::FY25.note: IGAAP/statutory shareholders' equity (basis: IGAAP). From the Q4 FY25 investor presentation.

niva-bupa::solvency_ratio::FY23.source_name: Niva Bupa IRDAI Public Disclosure (year ended Mar 23) — Solvency Margin Ratio
niva-bupa::solvency_ratio::FY23.note: Year-end solvency margin (point value) from the IRDAI disclosure — basis matches the FY25 solvency cell.

niva-bupa::pat_igaap::FY22.source_name: Niva Bupa IRDAI Public Disclosure (year ended Mar 22) — Profit/(Loss) after tax, full year (1/n basis)
niva-bupa::pat_igaap::FY22.note: Full-year PAT (IRDAI 1/n revenue-account basis), YTD column — method self-validated against the FY25 store value (≈214).

niva-bupa::pat_igaap::FY23.source_name: Niva Bupa IRDAI Public Disclosure (year ended Mar 23) — Profit/(Loss) after tax, full year (1/n basis)
niva-bupa::pat_igaap::FY23.note: Full-year PAT (IRDAI 1/n revenue-account basis), YTD column — method self-validated against the FY25 store value (≈214).

niva-bupa::pat_igaap::FY26.source_name: Niva Bupa IRDAI Public Disclosure (year ended Mar 26) — Profit/(Loss) after tax, full year (1/n basis)
niva-bupa::pat_igaap::FY26.note: Full-year PAT (IRDAI 1/n revenue-account basis), YTD column — method self-validated against the FY25 store value (≈214).

niva-bupa::gross_direct_premium::FY26.source_name: Niva Bupa IRDAI Public Disclosure (year ended Mar 2026) — Gross Direct Premium 8,46,490 Lakhs = ₹8,464.90 Cr (full-year FY26, 1/n basis)
niva-bupa::gross_direct_premium::FY26.note: Full-year FY26 gross direct premium (IRDAI 1/n basis); Grand Total confirms 8,46,490 Lakhs.

niva-bupa::total_gwp::FY26.source_name: Niva Bupa IRDAI Public Disclosure (year ended Mar 2026) — Gross Direct Premium ₹8,464.90 Cr (full-year FY26, 1/n basis; same basis as FY25 ₹6,762.23 Cr)
niva-bupa::total_gwp::FY26.note: Total GWP on the 1/n basis = gross direct premium ₹8,464.90 Cr (the ex-1/n headline is ₹9,432.9 Cr).

niva-bupa::nwp::FY26.source_name: Niva Bupa Q4 FY26 Earnings Presentation — Key Performance Indicators: Net Written Premium FY2026 = ₹6,806.3 Cr
niva-bupa::nwp::FY26.note: FY26 NWP from the audited Q4 FY26 KPI table (FY24/FY25/FY26 = 4,421.0 / 5,369.4 / 6,806.3).

niva-bupa::solvency_ratio::FY22.source_name: Niva Bupa IRDAI Public Disclosure (year ended Mar 2022) — Solvency Ratio (Total ASM / Total RSM) = 1.72
niva-bupa::solvency_ratio::FY22.note: Year-end FY22 solvency margin ratio from the IRDAI disclosure.

niva-bupa::net_worth_ifrs::FY23.source_name: Niva Bupa Q4 FY25 Investor Presentation — Net Worth (₹ in Crores) FY23 = ₹831.1 Cr
niva-bupa::net_worth_ifrs::FY23.note: Net worth from the deck KPI line (FY23/FY24/FY25 = 831.1 / 2,049.6 / 3,058.3; FY26 = 3,219.0) — same basis as the stored FY25 ₹3,058.3 Cr.

niva-bupa::net_worth_ifrs::FY24.source_name: Niva Bupa Q4 FY25 Investor Presentation — Net Worth (₹ in Crores) FY24 = ₹2,049.6 Cr
niva-bupa::net_worth_ifrs::FY24.note: Net worth from the deck KPI line (FY23/FY24/FY25 = 831.1 / 2,049.6 / 3,058.3; FY26 = 3,219.0) — same basis as the stored FY25 ₹3,058.3 Cr.

niva-bupa::net_worth_ifrs::FY26.source_name: Niva Bupa Q4 FY26 Earnings Presentation — Net Worth (₹ in Crores) FY26 = ₹3,219 Cr
niva-bupa::net_worth_ifrs::FY26.note: Net worth from the deck KPI line (FY23/FY24/FY25 = 831.1 / 2,049.6 / 3,058.3; FY26 = 3,219.0) — same basis as the stored FY25 ₹3,058.3 Cr.

niva-bupa::pat_ifrs::FY22.note: IFRS accounting not available — Niva Bupa began producing IFRS / Ind-AS special-purpose financials from FY23; no FY22 IFRS basis exists.

niva-bupa::claims_ratio_ifrs::FY22.note: IFRS accounting not available — Niva Bupa began producing IFRS / Ind-AS special-purpose financials from FY23; no FY22 IFRS basis exists.

niva-bupa::net_worth_ifrs::FY22.note: IFRS accounting not available — Niva Bupa began producing IFRS / Ind-AS special-purpose financials from FY23; no FY22 IFRS basis exists.

niva-bupa::claims_ratio_igaap::FY23.source_name: Niva Bupa IRDAI Public Disclosure (year ended Mar 2023) — Net Incurred Claims to Net Earned Premium = 54% (FY23, pre-1/n basis)
niva-bupa::claims_ratio_igaap::FY23.source_page: Analytical Ratios — Net Incurred Claims to Net Earned Premium
niva-bupa::claims_ratio_igaap::FY23.note: Pre-1/n basis. Claims ratio (net incurred claims ÷ net earned premium) from the IRDAI disclosure; this definition is stable across the FY24 rule change, so it is comparable to the FY24+ series (older filing states whole-percent precision).

niva-bupa::claims_ratio_igaap::FY22.source_name: Niva Bupa IRDAI Public Disclosure (year ended Mar 2023) — Net Incurred Claims to Net Earned Premium = 62% (FY22, pre-1/n basis)
niva-bupa::claims_ratio_igaap::FY22.source_page: Analytical Ratios — Net Incurred Claims to Net Earned Premium
niva-bupa::claims_ratio_igaap::FY22.note: Pre-1/n basis (FY22 comparative column of the Mar-2023 disclosure). Claims ratio = net incurred claims ÷ net earned premium — comparable to the FY24+ series; whole-percent precision.

niva-bupa::commission_ratio_igaap::FY22.source_name: Not comparable — ratio definition changed in FY24
niva-bupa::commission_ratio_igaap::FY22.note: Pre-1/n basis. The commission and expense (EOM) ratio definitions changed under the 2023 expenses-of-management regulations effective FY24, so the FY22/FY23 figures are on a different basis and not comparable to the FY24+ series — left blank rather than shown misleadingly.

niva-bupa::commission_ratio_igaap::FY23.source_name: Not comparable — ratio definition changed in FY24
niva-bupa::commission_ratio_igaap::FY23.note: Pre-1/n basis. The commission and expense (EOM) ratio definitions changed under the 2023 expenses-of-management regulations effective FY24, so the FY22/FY23 figures are on a different basis and not comparable to the FY24+ series — left blank rather than shown misleadingly.

niva-bupa::expense_ratio_igaap::FY22.source_name: Not comparable — ratio definition changed in FY24
niva-bupa::expense_ratio_igaap::FY22.note: Pre-1/n basis. The commission and expense (EOM) ratio definitions changed under the 2023 expenses-of-management regulations effective FY24, so the FY22/FY23 figures are on a different basis and not comparable to the FY24+ series — left blank rather than shown misleadingly.

niva-bupa::expense_ratio_igaap::FY23.source_name: Not comparable — ratio definition changed in FY24
niva-bupa::expense_ratio_igaap::FY23.note: Pre-1/n basis. The commission and expense (EOM) ratio definitions changed under the 2023 expenses-of-management regulations effective FY24, so the FY22/FY23 figures are on a different basis and not comparable to the FY24+ series — left blank rather than shown misleadingly.

niva-bupa::settlement_ratio::FY22.note: Niva Bupa began reporting the claim settlement ratio from FY23 (90.5% / 91.9% / 92.4%); no FY22 figure was published.

niva-bupa::settlement_ratio::FY26.source_name: FY26 annual report not yet published
niva-bupa::settlement_ratio::FY26.note: The audited FY26 annual report is not out yet. The Q4 FY26 deck shows a settlement figure on a different basis (by rupee value, not by number of claims), so it is not comparable to the FY23–FY25 by-number series — held rather than mixing bases.

niva-bupa::renewal_rate::FY22.note: Niva Bupa disclosed the renewal rate only for FY25; it does not appear in any earlier or later filing, so there is no source for the other years.

niva-bupa::customer_retention::FY22.note: Niva Bupa disclosed customer retention only for FY25; it does not appear in any earlier or later filing, so there is no source for the other years.

niva-bupa::claims_ratio_ifrs::FY23.source_name: IFRS claims ratio not broken out for FY23
niva-bupa::claims_ratio_ifrs::FY23.note: The IFRS (Ind-AS) special-purpose series begins FY23, but the IFRS claims-ratio breakdown is only shown from FY24 onward, so FY23 has no published value.

star-health::net_worth_ifrs::FY22.note: Net worth (share capital + reserves) from the AR 5-year financial highlights (702,203 / 633,924 / 543,013 / 451,388 Lakhs = FY25/FY24/FY23/FY22).

star-health::solvency_ratio::FY22.source_name: Star Health FY2024-25 Annual Report — Solvency Ratio (5-year) FY22 = 1.67
star-health::solvency_ratio::FY22.note: Year-end FY22 solvency ratio from the AR 5-year solvency disclosure.

star-health::nep::FY22.source_name: Star Health FY2024-25 Annual Report — Net Earned Premium FY22 = ₹9,809.17 Cr (NWP 10,809.49 − Δ unearned-premium reserve 1,000.32)
star-health::nep::FY22.note: NEP = Net premium income − change in UPR; method validated against the AR-stated FY24/FY25 NEP.

star-health::nep::FY23.source_name: Star Health FY2024-25 Annual Report — Net Earned Premium FY23 = ₹11,261.59 Cr (NWP 12,319.64 − Δ UPR 1,058.05)
star-health::nep::FY23.note: NEP = Net premium income − change in UPR; method validated against the AR-stated FY24/FY25 NEP.

star-health::pat_igaap::FY22.source_name: Star Health FY2024-25 Annual Report — Profit/(Loss) after tax FY22 = ₹(1,040.67) Cr
star-health::pat_igaap::FY22.note: FY22 net loss (COVID claims surge) from the AR 5-year highlights (1,04,067 Lakhs).

star-health::claims_ratio_igaap::FY22.source_name: Star Health FY2024-25 Annual Report — Claims ratio FY22 = 87.06% (Net incurred claims 8,539.99 ÷ NEP 9,809.17)
star-health::claims_ratio_igaap::FY22.note: Net incurred claims ÷ NEP; method matches the AR-stated FY25 70.30% / FY24 66.42% exactly.

star-health::claims_ratio_igaap::FY23.source_name: Star Health FY2024-25 Annual Report — Claims ratio FY23 = 65.00% (Net incurred claims 7,320.40 ÷ NEP 11,261.59)
star-health::claims_ratio_igaap::FY23.note: Net incurred claims ÷ NEP; method matches the AR-stated FY25/FY24 claims ratios.

star-health::expense_ratio_igaap::FY22.source_name: Star Health FY2024-25 Annual Report — Expense ratio FY22 = 31.59% (Expenses of Management 3,415.13 ÷ NWP 10,809.49)
star-health::expense_ratio_igaap::FY22.note: EOM (operating expenses + net commission) ÷ NWP; method matches the AR-stated FY25 30.80%.

star-health::expense_ratio_igaap::FY23.source_name: Star Health FY2024-25 Annual Report — Expense ratio FY23 = 31.64% (Expenses of Management 3,898.20 ÷ NWP 12,319.64)
star-health::expense_ratio_igaap::FY23.note: EOM (operating expenses + net commission) ÷ NWP; method matches the AR-stated FY25 30.80%.

star-health::combined_ratio_igaap::FY22.source_name: Star Health FY2024-25 Annual Report — Combined ratio FY22 = 118.65% (claims 87.06% + expense 31.59%)
star-health::combined_ratio_igaap::FY22.note: AR combined-ratio definition (NIC/NEP + EOM/NWP); FY22 reflects the COVID claims surge.

star-health::combined_ratio_igaap::FY23.source_name: Star Health FY2024-25 Annual Report — Combined ratio FY23 = 96.64% (claims 65.00% + expense 31.64%)

star-health::commission_ratio_igaap::FY2.source_name: Star Health FY2024-25 Annual Report — Commission ratio FY22 = 13.8% (Net commission ÷ NWP)
star-health::commission_ratio_igaap::FY2.note: Net commission ÷ NWP from the AR 5-year highlights (a component of the expense ratio).

star-health::commission_ratio_igaap::FY2.source_name: Star Health FY2024-25 Annual Report — Commission ratio FY23 = 13.66% (Net commission ÷ NWP)
star-health::commission_ratio_igaap::FY2.note: Net commission ÷ NWP from the AR 5-year highlights (a component of the expense ratio).

star-health::commission_ratio_igaap::FY2.source_name: Star Health FY2024-25 Annual Report — Commission ratio FY24 = 13.22% (Net commission ÷ NWP)
star-health::commission_ratio_igaap::FY2.note: Net commission ÷ NWP from the AR 5-year highlights (a component of the expense ratio).
